tools.name: get_patient_age
tools.description: Return the age of a patient in years given their hospital ID.

tools.name: get_patient_status
tools.description:
Return the current admission status of a patient.

If dateEnd is None the patient is currently admitted.
If dateEnd is set the patient has been discharged.

tools.name: get_admission_history
tools.description:
Return the admission record(s) for a patient.

NOTE: Agile's current API returns one event per request.
Multi-event history requires a dedicated history endpoint (Phase 2).

tools.name: get_patient_summary
tools.description:
Generate a concise clinical summary for a patient using an LLM.

Calls the LLM N times independently and returns the most consistent
response together with a semantic confidence score (0–1).
LOW confidence means the model was uncertain — clinician must verify.

tools.name: get_patient_discharge_draft
tools.description: Generate a draft discharge letter section for a patient.

tools.name: get_patients_by_diagnosis
tools.description: Return all patients whose primary diagnosis code starts with the given prefix.

icd10_prefix.description: numeric prefix (e.g. "428" for heart failure, "434" for stroke)

tools.name: get_cohort_summary
tools.description:
Generate a cohort-level summary with per-patient LLM summaries
and a gated aggregate confidence score.

tools.name: get_recently_admitted
tools.description: Return all patients admitted within the last N days.
